policy_description: This step performs QA over Step 14AA outputs only.
QA reads derived execution outputs, not raw structure files.
Raw CIF/mmCIF is not read in this QA gate.
Per-sample atom/event tables are not modified.
No split or leakage matrix is written.
Sample index design gate is the next allowed step.
Feature semantics audit remains required before training.
Leakage/split gate remains required before training.
The canonical five mask tasks are preserved.
QA artifacts must not be used for training.
